name: Azrith
trait: Azrith döyüş meydanında sağ qaldığı və öz qalxanıqırılmadığı müddətcə ətrafındakı bütün dost kartlara +10% hasar bonusu təmin edər. Düşmən hücumları nəticəsində onun qalxanı qırıldıqda, Azrith geri çəkilmir və olduğu koordinata müqəddəs bir "Bannerox" sancar.
story: Aza is the brilliant and courageous commander who leads the royal army from the front. Her golden armor shines with authority, complemented by a striking red cloak that flows behind her like a river of blood. In her right hand, she wields a sword of legendary status, while her left hand grips a massive red flag. This banner is more than a symbol; it is said to grant her supernatural strength. She is a scholar of war, guiding her troops with both unmatched intellect and fearless power.

forms.name: Bannerox
forms.trait: Meydanda qalan bu bayraq strateji bir nöqtə rolunu oynayır və onun yaxınlığındakı bütün dost kartlara +10% hücum sürəti bonusu bəxş edərək ordunun döyüş əzmini artırar.

name: Untouch
trait: Bu dözümlü döyüşçünün canı hər 20% azaldıqda o, bədənini qoruyan xüsusi bir fazaya keçər və 2 saniyəlik tam toxunulmazlıq statusu qazanar. Bu toxunulmazlıq müddəti bitdikdən sonra edəcəyi ilk vuruşu rəqibə əlavə +20% hasar yetirər. Bu qabiliyyət onu kritik anlarda həm qoruyur, həm də əks-hücum üçün gücləndirir.
story: UnTouch is the younger sister of Aza, but her power is legendary throughout the kingdom. She wears heavy, golden armor and carries a pair of specialized golden gauntlets on both hands. When she strikes the earth with these gauntlets, she triggers massive earthquakes that can split mountains in two. Despite her overwhelming physical strength, her heart beats for her people, and she fights to protect their homes from any threat. She is the kingdom's ultimate force of nature, a girl whose kindness is as deep as her strikes are shattering.

name: Heartix
trait: Hər 40 saniyədə qarşıdakı rəqibi 20 saniyəlik öz tərəfinə çəkər

name: R-1
trait: Atışları qalxandan keçər, "İnsan" tipli kartlara -50% daha az hasar verər

name: Blank
trait: Hər rəqib kart öldürdükdə +1 Hasar bonusu (Max: 5)

name: Magmara
trait: Rəqib kartlara ekstra 3x10 Yanma Hasarı verər

name: Willowshade
trait: Vuruşları qalxandan keçər, öləndə "Octarion"-a dönüşər
story: The Abyssal Elf, a mesmerizing high elf from the same hidden botanical realm as Sylviana, yet drawn toward the mysterious depths of ancient oceans rather than blooming gardens. She embodies the beauty, elegance, and unpredictability of the sea, merging elven grace with abyssal marine power. Willowshade possesses long, flowing hair with deep ocean-inspired hues, blending dark blue, teal, and subtle violet tones. Her delicate elven features and pointed ears remain unmistakably noble, but her appearance carries an enigmatic aura unlike the warmth of her sister. Her eyes glow with the colors of deep ocean waters, reflecting intelligence, curiosity, and hidden power. She wears an elegant fantasy outfit inspired by marine life and elven nobility. Flowing fabrics resemble moving water, while intricate patterns evoke coral structures, ocean currents, and the graceful forms of sea creatures. Decorative elements inspired by octopuses subtly appear throughout her attire, including tentacle-like embroidery, organic curves, and aquatic motifs that feel sophisticated rather than monstrous. Around her swirl beautiful currents of magical water suspended in midair. The water forms elegant spirals, floating droplets, and fluid ribbons that continuously move around her body. Emerging from these currents are translucent spectral tentacles composed entirely of glowing oceanic energy. These ethereal appendages move gracefully through the air like living currents, creating a striking and mystical visual effect. Several small luminous sea creatures made of magical water swim through the floating currents around her. Tiny jellyfish-like spirits, glowing fish, and aquatic particles enhance the oceanic atmosphere. Her presence feels adaptable, intelligent, and endlessly fluid, much like the creatures she admires. The environment combines elven beauty with abyssal mystery. Behind her lies a breathtaking coastal sanctuary where ancient elven architecture merges with crystal-clear waters, glowing coral formations, bioluminescent marine plants, and hidden underwater ruins visible through magical portals. Moonlight reflects across the water, creating a dreamlike and enchanting atmosphere. The overall composition should emphasize elegance, mystery, and oceanic magic rather than darkness or horror. Willowshade appears as a graceful master of the sea's hidden wonders, commanding the beauty and power of marine life through refined elven magic.

forms.name: Octarion
forms.trait: Ölən zaman olduğu yerə 3x5 Zəhər hasarı verər

name: Collector
trait: Öldürdüyü hər rəqib kart üçün +2 Mana qazanar

name: Sushu
trait: Görünməz olar, rəqibin içinə girərək öləndə qədər hasar verər

name: Umbra
trait: Canı 75% olduqda 3 saniyəlik görünməz olar, 50% olduqda 7,500 Karo geriyə gedər

name: Thief
trait: 15,000 Karo qabaqdakı ilk rəqibin özəlliyini oğurlayar

name: Rotlings
trait: Hər ölən rəqib kart üçün +1 Hasar bonusu
story: A swarm of Rotlings, horrifying decaying zombies from beyond reality, advancing across a ruined dimensional wasteland. Their rotting bodies are completely entangled in twisted roots, corrupted vines, fungal growths, and cosmic filth. Flesh appears partially decomposed, with ancient roots piercing through bones and limbs, creating unnatural and disturbing forms. Every Rotling looks different, yet all share the same plague-like corruption and relentless hunger. The creatures move together as a spreading infestation, multiplying endlessly as they advance. Wherever they pass, the ground decays into blackened wasteland. Reality itself appears corrupted around them, with cracks, dead vegetation, corrupted soil, and fragments of collapsing dimensions scattered throughout the environment. Thick clouds of dark spores, dust, and corruption drift through the air. Some Rotlings crawl on all fours while others stagger forward in twisted humanoid shapes. Their bodies are covered with tangled roots, thorny growths, parasitic plants, and layers of cosmic decay. Their glowing eyes reflect endless hunger and mindless devotion to destruction. The swarm stretches into the distance, emphasizing their overwhelming numbers and unstoppable spread. Above them, faint silhouettes of flying creatures can be seen in the sky, causing visible unease within the horde. Several Rotlings instinctively look upward in fear, reinforcing their only known weakness. The contrast between their confidence on the ground and their fear of aerial threats adds tension to the scene.

name: Stormblade
trait: Hasarı yaxındakı rəqiblərə sıçrayar

name: Venom Fangs
trait: Vuruşları ekstra 3x1 hasar verər və rəqib kartdan +0,5% Kritik Şansı oğurlayar

name: Skyhunter
trait: Skyhunter rəqibləri ilə arasındakı məsafəni öz xeyrinə istifadə edən peşəkar bir ovçudur. O, hədəf aldığı rəqib kart ilə öz arasındakı hər karo üçün +10% hasar bonusu qazanar. Rəqib ondan nə qədər uzaq olarsa, Skyhunter-in oxları bir o qədər dağıdıcı gücə sahib olur. Bu xüsusiyyət onu arxa cəbhədən düşmənin əsas qüvvələrini zərərsizləşdirmək üçün mükəmməl bir uzaq məsafəli karta çevirir.
story: SkyHunter is a veteran warrior of immense talent, serving as the kingdom's silent guardian from above. Clad in golden armor designed for stealth, he is a master of invisibility who believes that being seen is a failure. He uses a custom-built weapon specifically engineered to obliterate any flying creature or threat within seconds. Stealth is his primary tool; he moves through the shadows of the clouds, ensuring that the skies remain clear for the Royal Blood. He is the unseen predator that enemies never hear coming until it is too late.

name: Rockback
trait: Rockback rəqib karta doğru irəliləyərkən böyük bir impuls yığar və hədəfə yaxınlaşana qədər +50% sürət qazanar. Bu sürətlə etdiyi ilk vuruşu düşmənə əlavə +150% hasar vurar. Üstəlik, onun qoruyucu qalxanı qırıldıqdan sonrakı 6 saniyə ərzində etdiyi hər bir vuruş ona +10 Qalxan bərpa edər.
story: Once a peaceful armadillo living quietly in the savanna, Rockback was kidnapped and subjected to Henry's most painful mutations. His natural armor has been fused with metallic minerals, making his shell virtually indestructible. He is no longer a shy creature; he is a living tank. When he rolls into a ball, he becomes a crushing boulder that flattens anything in his path. Rockback is a tragic masterpiece—a gentle soul trapped inside a jagged, unstoppable weapon of war.

name: Neon Droid
trait: Hasar verdikcə 3 saniyəlik +20% Saldırı Hızı qazanar (Max: 60%)
story: Neon Droid floats through the dark caverns as the ultimate security asset for the Constructs. From a distance, this sleek guardian resembles a metallic, floating ball gliding silently through the air. Do not let its shape fool you; despite having only a single central eye, its advanced sensors see absolutely everything, leaving no blind spots for intruders. It scans the shadows constantly, ready to eliminate any threat to the facility with mechanical precision.

name: Void Wraith
trait: Ətrafındakı rəqib kartların hasarlarının 20%-ni özünə çəkər (Max: 16)
story: Void Wraith, an ancient interdimensional phantom emerging from a realm where time does not exist. The entity floats silently above the ground, existing outside the laws of reality. Its form is ghostly and incomprehensible, appearing as a dark spectral figure composed of living void energy, cosmic shadows, and fragments of broken space. Its body is partially transparent, with portions dissolving into darkness and drifting into the surrounding void. A terrifying aura surrounds the Void Wraith, constantly pulling energy from everything nearby. Streams of luminous life essence flow from the environment toward the phantom, spiraling around its body before being absorbed into its core. The stolen energy forms glowing currents that orbit the entity like celestial rivers being consumed by an endless abyss. The closer objects are to the Wraith, the more drained and lifeless they appear. Its face is hidden beneath layers of darkness, revealing only faint glowing eyes deep within the void. Fragments of shattered reality float around it—broken stones, pieces of ancient structures, and distorted particles suspended in impossible positions as if time itself has ceased to function. The air around the entity appears warped and unstable, creating subtle gravitational distortions. The environment resembles a place beyond time and existence, with fractured dimensions, cosmic darkness, and endless emptiness stretching into the distance. Wisps of dark energy, spectral fog, and dimensional anomalies surround the Wraith, emphasizing its nature as a being detached from all eras and realities. The overall atmosphere is eerie, mysterious, and overwhelming. The Void Wraith appears less like a creature and more like a living manifestation of entropy and consumption, silently draining all life and energy in its presence.

name: Bio Mech
trait: Hər hasar aldıqda ətrafdakı kartlar +1% Qalxan qazanar

name: Mixela
trait: 3x3 Yaxınında ölən kartların canlarının 60%-ni özünə qatar

name: Laura
trait: Laura hər saniyə +8 yük qazanar. 100 yükə çatdıqda daxili enerjisini sərbəst buraxaraq ətrafa enerji dalğası yayar, Bu enerji dalğası ətrafındakı bütün dost kartların statistikalarını (hücum, müdafiə, sürət) +25% artırar.
story: Laura has dedicated her life to the art of healing, focusing her magical energy on mending wounds and restoring life. Raised and educated by the Chrono Mage, she views the world with a patient, timeless perspective. She moves through the battlefield as a beacon of restoration, shielding her allies from the brink of death. Despite her immense power, she refuses to use it for harm, believing that her true purpose is to preserve the fragile balance of life around her.
